description_long: This is a small, blocky doll with a pixelated design, featuring a pale gray face with red circular markings on the cheeks and dark, hollow eyes. The doll wears a black suit with a red bow tie and red buttons, giving it a formal yet eerie appearance. Its head is large and square-shaped, with a black, helmet-like hair or hood that frames the face. The arms and legs are short and stubby, with the hands and feet rendered in black, while the shoes have red soles. The overall style is reminiscent of retro video game characters, with a strong contrast between the dark clothing and the pale face. The doll stands upright on a flat surface, and its compact, solid form suggests it is made primarily of plastic.
description: A pixelated, blocky doll with a pale face, red cheeks, black suit, and red bow tie, featuring a large square head and short limbs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's pale face with red cheeks, black suit, red bow tie, and large square head.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the head and body, with the red bow tie and hands visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid black back of the head and body, with only the red soles of the shoes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the head, body, and red bow tie.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a formal black suit with a red bow tie and red buttons, evoking a classic tuxedo style. The outfit is simple, with no visible patterns, and the shoes have red soles, adding a pop of color to the monochrome ensemble.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its arms slightly bent at the sides and legs straight. The head faces forward, and the overall posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral expression with a small, straight mouth, round black eyes, and red circular markings on the cheeks, giving it a slightly eerie but emotionless look.
attribute_hair_style: The doll has a short, blocky black hairstyle or hood that frames the face and covers the back and sides of the head.
